channel.title: Paper on colored-dye's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Paper on colored-dye's blog

item.title: Notes on "Scalable Multi-Stage Influence Function for Large Language Models via EKFAC"
item.description:
As per camera ready submission requirements of IJCAI 2025, an extra page is charged 300 USD/page (😢). I have no intention of paying for this, so a trade-off is to post the full paper with the Appendix on Arxiv.

Unfortunately, I am working on other projects and have yet managed to polish the Appendix for the IJCAI paper. So here is the unpolished version with the Appendix, in case anyone needs it.
